hidden_state.wab_instruction: Process your morning inbox. Star the two emails that mention an end-of-day deadline or need your sign-off. Archive the newsletter in your Promotions tab and the FYI update in your Primary tab. Forward the email that asks you to loop in a colleague — find the correct person from the email body. Reply to the email from {target.reply_sender_name} about the project update (Reply only, not Reply All). Reply to the email from {target.reply_b_sender_name} confirming receipt. Then create an 'Action Required' label and apply it to the two starred emails.
